nodes.name: CNN Fear & Greed
nodes.description: Fetch CNN Fear & Greed index - score 0-100, rating text, change vs yesterday/week

nodes.name: Crypto Fear & Greed
nodes.description: Fetch Crypto Fear & Greed index from Alternative.me - value, classification, change vs yesterday

nodes.name: VIX
nodes.description: Fetch VIX from Yahoo Finance - last close, 5d change, level classification

nodes.name: DXY
nodes.description: Fetch US Dollar Index from Yahoo Finance - current price, weekly % change, trend

nodes.name: Gold (XAUUSD)
nodes.description: Fetch Gold price from Yahoo Finance for Gold/Oil ratio calculation

nodes.name: Oil (CL)
nodes.description: Fetch Crude Oil price from Yahoo Finance for Gold/Oil ratio calculation

nodes.name: Merge & Calculate
nodes.description: Merge all sentiment data and calculate Risk Appetite Score (0-100) with classification

nodes.name: Store JSON
nodes.description: Store latest sentiment data as JSON for programmatic access

nodes.name: Store TXT
nodes.description: Store latest formatted summary as TXT for human readability

nodes.name: Store History
nodes.description: Append to sentiment history (last 24h for evolution tracking)

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.description: GET /webhook/sentiment — returns current formatted sentiment summary

nodes.name: Update History
nodes.description: Load existing history, append current reading, keep only last 24h

$metadata.templateDescription: Hourly Fear & Greed sentiment aggregation for trading decisions
